step_rationale: Inflammatory response mediator; candidate insulin–CAD link, but mechanism in plaque unclear.
mechanism: Inflammatory peptide implicated in insulin signaling–atherosclerosis crosstalk and acute-phase response in MI.

references.title: Exploring the pathways linking fasting insulin to coronary artery disease: a proteome-wide Mendelian randomization study.
Identification of novel candidate biomarkers for acute myocardial infarction by the Olink proteomics platform.
references.journal: Clinica chimica acta; international journal of clinical chemistry
